prompt: Try to apply the UI mockup elements: on the left is the cooking content, in the middle is the travel content, and on the right is the yoga content.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the content within the UI elements: the mobile UI on the left should feature cooking-related content; the tall website UI in the middle should display travel-related content; and the desktop monitor UI on the right should continue to display yoga-related content.
objects: Cooking-related content within the mobile UI
